key: The sprite of the weapon when out of ammo. If null, the sprite doesnt change.
note: инспекторский тултип поля оружия (out of ammo / If null) — не отображается в игре

key: The sound played when weapon is fired.
The animations used when the weapon is used.
The sprite that appears on entities when shot.
The blood particle effect that appears when an entity is shot.
The tracer that appears when the weapon is shot. Needs to have a LineRenderer component in it.
The object spawned at the barrel when shooting.
The object to instantiate when the bullet hits a misc object. Usually sparks
The position of the barrel.
A random one of these sounds will be played when a misc surface is shot (walls, crates, etc).
The ammo type this weapon uses when reloading, etc. 0 is mini ammo, 1 is normal, 2 is heavy, 3 is energy, 4 is explosive.
note: инспекторский тултип с кодами полей — для разработчика

key: The preffered slot for this weapon. 0 for pistols, 1 for your main guns, 2 for snipers and others.
note: инспекторский тултип с кодами слотов — для разработчика

key: How much damage the weapon loses for each unit of distance. Minimum damage dealt is 1.
How much the weapon damage varies. Randomly adds or removes this value.
Damage multiplier for critical hits. 1 will double the damage, 2 will triple etc.
Randomly makes the bullet go up/down. 0 is no spread, 1 is a 45 degree spread.
Knock down the user after shooting. Use as a last resort to balance overpowered weapons.
note: инспекторский тултип (совет по балансу) — для разработчика

key: Sound played when the weapon runs out of ammo. Used by the garand and it's signature ping.
Some weapons have lasers on them by default, for balancing.
Multiplier for the knockback the weapons inflicts on the bearer. Sniper has this lowered
How close/far away the ai will try to stay to the target with this weapon. 1 is normal distance
note: инспекторский тултип поля ИИ — для разработчика

key: How many bodies a bullet can penetrate. 2 for one body (if you want 3 penetrated bodies, put 6)
note: инспекторский тултип с кодами — для разработчика

key: Used for shotguns and such
Put all colliders that you want the gun to ignore here. Things like limbs, the body collider, etc.
Camera the rain should hover over, defaults to main camera
note: инспекторский тултип поля дождя — для разработчика

key: Whether rain should follow the camera. If false, rain must be moved manually and will not follow the camera.
Light rain looping clip
Medium rain looping clip
